PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>

SELECT ?manager
WHERE {
    {
        SELECT ?service
        WHERE {
            ?service a pv:Service ;
                     pv:price ?priceObj .
            ?priceObj pv:amount ?amount .
        } 
        ORDER BY DESC(?amount)
        LIMIT 1
    }
    ?service pv:hasProductManager ?manager .
}

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?result
WHERE
{
  ?result pv:hasCategory <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/prod-cat-Coil> .
  ?result pv:width_mm ?width_mm .
  ?result pv:depth_mm ?depth_mm .
  ?result pv:height_mm ?height_mm .
  ?result pv:weight_g ?weight_g .
  BIND(?width_mm * ?depth_mm * ?height_mm / 1000000000 AS ?volume_m3)
  BIND(?weight_g / 1000 AS ?weight_kg)
  BIND(?weight_kg / ?volume_m3 AS ?density)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?density)
LIMIT 1

ASK
WHERE {
  { # all BOMs with parts from russia
    SELECT ?bom
    WHERE {
      ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
      ?bomPart pv:hasPart ?hw .
      ?hw pv:hasSupplier ?suppl .
      ?suppl pv:addressCountry ?country .
      FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?country), LCASE("Russia")))
    }
  }

  # services eligible for parts associated with these BOMs?

  ?s pv:eligibleFor ?hw .
  ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
  ?bomPart pv:hasPart ?hw .

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX ecc: <https://ns.eccenca.com/>
PREFIX void: <http://rdfs.org/ns/void#>
PREFIX vann: <http://purl.org/vocab/vann/>

PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?supplier ?supplierName ?supplierCountry ?hardware ?priceAmount
WHERE { 
    {
        SELECT ?hardware ?priceAmount
        WHERE { 
            ?hardware a pv:Hardware ; 
                      pv:price ?price . 
            ?price pv:amount ?priceAmount ; 
                   pv:currency "EUR" . 
        }
        ORDER BY DESC(?priceAmount)
        OFFSET 5
        LIMIT 5
    }

    ?hardware pv:hasSupplier ?supplier .
    ?supplier pv:name ?supplierName ;
              pv:country ?country .
    ?country rdfs:label ?supplierCountry .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?priceAmount)

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>

PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT ?departmentName (COUNT(?employee) AS ?numberOfEmployees)
WHERE {
    ?employee a pv:Employee ;
              pv:memberOf ?department .
    ?department pv:name ?departmentName .
} GROUP BY ?departmentName
HAVING (COUNT(?employee) > 5)
ORDER BY DESC(?numberOfEmployees)

PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?supplierName (ROUND(AVG(?priceAmount)) AS ?averagePrice)
WHERE {
  ?product pv:price ?price ;
           pv:hasSupplier ?supplier .
  ?price pv:amount ?priceAmount ;
         pv:currency "EUR" .
  ?supplier pv:name ?supplierName .
}
GROUP BY ?supplierName

SELECT ?department

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>

PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>

SELECT ?product ?compatibleProduct ?priceDiff
WHERE { 
  ?product a pv:Product ;
           pv:compatibleProduct ?compatibleProduct ;
           pv:price ?prodPrice .
  ?prodPrice pv:amount ?productPriceAmount .

  ?compatibleProduct pv:price ?compPrice .
  ?compPrice pv:amount ?compProductPriceAmount .

  BIND(abs(?productPriceAmount - ?compProductPriceAmount) AS ?priceDiff)
}

SELECT ?bom (COUNT(?part) AS ?partCount) (SUM(?qty) AS ?totalQty)
WHERE {
  ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
    pv:hasBomPart ?part .
  ?part pv:quantity ?qty_ .

}

PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?bom (AVG(?unitCost) AS ?averageUnitCost) WHERE {
  ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
       pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
  ?bomPart pv:part ?hardware .
  ?hardware a pv:Hardware ;
            pv:price ?price .
  ?price pv:amount ?unitCost ;
         pv:currency "EUR" .
} 
GROUP BY ?bom
ORDER BY DESC(?averageUnitCost)
LIMIT 1

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX ecc: <https://ns.eccenca.com/>
PREFIX void: <http://rdfs.org/ns/void#>
PREFIX vann: <http://purl.org/vocab/vann/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT ?product1 ?product2 WHERE { 
    ?product1 pv:compatibleProduct ?product2 .
    ?product2 pv:compatibleProduct ?product1 .
    FILTER(?product1 != ?product2)
}

  ?hardware pv:reliabilityIndex ?reliabilityIndex .
  ?hardware pv:hasSupplier ?result .
}

SELECT ?supplierName ?reliability WHERE { 
  ?inductor a pv:Hardware ;
            pv:name "Inductor" ;
            pv:reliabilityIndex ?reliability ;
            pv:hasSupplier ?supplier .

} ORDER BY DESC(?reliability)

SELECT DISTINCT ?result (AVG(?reliabilityIndex) AS ?averageReliabilityIndex)

SELECT DISTINCT ?bom WHERE {

         pv:hasBomPart ?part .

          pv:part ?product .
    ?product pv:hasSupplier ?supplier .
    ?supplier pv:country dbr:Poland .
}

golden:
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?result (COUNT(?result) AS ?count)
WHERE
{
  ?result pv:responsibleFor ?product .
}
GROUP BY ?result
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
generated:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
PREFIX schema: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX ecc: <https://ns.eccenca.com/>
PREFIX void: <http://rdfs.org/ns/void#>
PREFIX vann: <http://purl.org/vocab/vann/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>
SELECT ?department (COUNT(?product) AS ?productCount)
WHERE { 
    ?department a pv:Department .
    ?department pv:responsibleFor ?product .
}
GROUP BY ?department
ORDER BY DESC(?productCount)
LIMIT 1
